ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who created the condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who last updated the condition */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the condition is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who created the unit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who last updated the unit */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the unit is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test parameter being logged */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual measured value during the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Engineer who conducted the test */,
  "test_group" TEXT /* Group of tests (e.g., batch, type) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who logged the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the result was logged */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who last updated the result */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the result was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the engineer in the testing process */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is currently active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the engineer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engineers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engineers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test log entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test parameter being tested */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer conducting the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was logged */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the test */,
  "test_group" TEXT /* Group of tests (e.g., batch, type) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who logged the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who last updated the log entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test parameter */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of change for the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "test_group" TEXT /* Group of tests (e.g., batch, type) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Engineer who last updated the version */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)
